subparts.text: Why a* b* is regular but not an bn? CO 1
Define Deterministic Finite Automata ? How is it different from Non Deterministic Finite Automata . CO 1
What is Derivation Tree and its types? Discuss with an example. CO 2
Define Context Free Grammar. Create a CFG for {anbn : n>o} CO 3
Define the term ambiguity and explain with the help of an example grammar? CO 1
Define Unrestricted Grammar . Write about the machine that accepts the UG. CO 2
What is halting problem, discuss about it briefly? CO 3
With neat diagram discuss about Linear Bounded Automata. CO 1

questions.question_text: Design a DFA for the Language accepting strings starting with ‘aba’ and ending with ‘bb’ over the alphabet Σ = {a, b}. Check whether the DFA accepts the strings: abaabb, abbbaab, ababa. CO 2 & CO 3

Discuss the step by step procedure followed in minimization of Deterministic Finite Automata and minimize the following finite automata. 0 1 q0 q1 q4 q1 q5 q2 *q2 q0 q2 q3 q6 q4 q4 q2 q5 q5 q5 q3 q6 q5 q2 Find out whether the minimized DFA accepts the following strings: 0010, 1101, 10010. CO 2
Define a Pushdown Automata . Design a PDA which accepts the Language L = {0n1n/n > 1} over Ʃ = {0, 1}. CO 1 & CO 2
What is Chomsky Normal Form ? Convert the following Context Free Grammar to CNF? SABa / BBb / DB / DA Aaab / bba / a BAc / C /b Cc / d / F / H Dd / ɛ CO 3
Define pumping Lemma for Context Free Language. And check whether the language L = { 0n1n2n3n/ n>1} is context free or not. CO 1 & CO 2
Design a TM for the Language L = {anbncn / n>1}. CO 1 & CO 3

What is Finite state Transducer? Explain the step by step procedure followed for converting a Mealy Machine to Moore Machine. Convert the following Mealy Machine to Moore Machine. Present state Next state Input a=0 Input a=1 State output State output q1 q3 0 q2 1 q2 q1 0 q4 0 q3 q2 1 q1 1 q4 q4 1 q3 0 CO 1 & CO 3

Discuss about Complexity classes P and NP. Define a Moore Machine . Convert the following Moore Machine to Mealy Machine. Present State Next state Output a=0 a=1 q0 q3 q1 0 q1 q1 q2 1 q2 q2 q3 0 q3 q3 q0 0 q4 q0 q4 1 CO 1 & CO 3
